releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at 1.1.0 -->

Update available models:

OpenAI
  - Added GPT-5.5, GPT-5.4, GPT-5.4 Mini, GPT-5.4 Nano
  - Removed GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1 Mini, GPT-4.1 Nano, O1, O3

  Anthropic
  - Added Claude Opus 4.7, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Claude Haiku 4.5
  - Removed Claude 4 Sonnet, Claude 4 Opus

  Google
  - Added Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview, Gemini 3 Flash Preview, Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite
  - Removed Gemini 2.0 Flash, Gemini 2.5 Flash Preview, Gemini 2.5 Pro Preview

  Perplexity
  - Added Sonar Pro, Sonar Reasoning Pro
  - Removed Sonar Reasoning (Sonar Deep Research and Sonar kept)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Epistemic-Technology/co-intelligence/compare/1.0.11...1.1.0

## What's Changed

* Address plugin review feedback by @mikethicke in https://github.com/Epistemic-Technology/co-intelligence/pull/15

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at 1.0.10 -->

## What's Changed
### Other Changes
* Fix dependabot security alerts by @mikethicke in https://github.com/Epistemic-Technology/co-intelligence/pull/5
* Add test infrastructure and 106 unit tests by @mikethicke in https://github.com/Epistemic-Technology/co-intelligence/pull/6
* Add test vault and development docs by @mikethicke in https://github.com/Epistemic-Technology/co-intelligence/pull/8
* Fix Dependabot security vulnerabilities by @mikethicke in https://github.com/Epistemic-Technology/co-intelligence/pull/9
* Fix streaming broken by AI SDK v6 chunk type changes by @mikethicke in https://github.com/Epistemic-Technology/co-intelligence/pull/10
* Address Obsidian plugin review feedback by @mikethicke in https://github.com/Epistemic-Technology/co-intelligence/pull/7
* Fix settings panel focus-stealing on API key input by @mikethicke in https://github.com/Epistemic-Technology/co-intelligence/pull/11
* Address Obsidian plugin review feedback and fix coding style issues by @mikethicke in https://github.com/Epistemic-Technology/co-intelligence/pull/14


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Epistemic-Technology/co-intelligence/compare/1.0.9...1.0.10

Addresses issues raised by plugin review:

- Use `instanceof` checks rather than casting to `TFile`
- Use DOM APIs rather than setting `innerHTML` directly
- Avoid uses of `any`
